en.extract:
The grey-winged Inca finch (Incaspiza ortizi) is a species of bird in the family Thraupidae.
It is endemic to Peru. Its natural habitat is subtropical or tropical high-altitude shrubland.
It is threatened by habitat loss.

The '''grey-winged Inca finch''' ('''''Incaspiza ortizi''''') is a species of [[bird]] in the family [[Thraupidae]].

It is [[Endemism|endemic]] to [[Peru]]. Its natural [[habitat]] is subtropical or tropical high-altitude [[shrubland]].
It is threatened by [[habitat loss]].
